zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice de Pyvlesdon於1225年出生在英國史洛普爾時，她的父親Roger de Puleston27歲，母親Agnes Monthermer18歲。她於1245年與Sir Robert de Harley在英國賀福爾賀福德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世在英國史洛普爾蕾托 布藍普頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice de Pyvlesdon于1225年出生在英国史洛普爾时，她的父亲Roger de Puleston27岁，母亲Agnes Monthermer18岁。她于1245年与Sir Robert de Harley在英国賀福爾賀福德结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世在英国史洛普爾蕾托 布藍普頓。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice de Pyvlesdon was born in 1225, in Shropshire, England, her father, Roger de Puleston, was 27 and her mother, Agnes Monthermer, was 18. She married Sir Robert de Harley in 1245, in Hereford, Herefordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died in Little Brampton, Shropshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice de Pyvlesdon est née en 1225, à Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, Roger de Puleston, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Agnes Monthermer, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Robert de Harley en 1245, à Hereford, Herefordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée à Little Brampton, Shropshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice de Pyvlesdon 1225 in Shropshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Roger de Puleston 27 und ihre Mutter Agnes Monthermer 18. Sie hat 1245 in Hereford, Herefordshire, England Sir Robert de Harley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb in Little Brampton, Shropshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice de Pyvlesdon è nata il nel 1225 nel Shropshire, England, sua padre, Roger de Puleston, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Agnes Monthermer, aveva 18 anni. Lei sposato Sir Robert de Harley nel 1245, nel Hereford, Herefordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel Little Brampton, Shropshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice de Pyvlesdonが1225年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアで生まれた時，父Roger de Pulestonは27歳，母Agnes Monthermerは18歳であった。1245年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアハーエフォードでSir Robert de Harleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女はイギリスシュロプシュアイアリットル ブランプトンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice de Pyvlesdon(이)가 1225년 영국 슈럽실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Roger de Puleston(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes Monthermer(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1245년 영국 허퍼드실르 허퍼드에서 Sir Robert de Harley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 슈럽실르 리틀 브램프턴에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice de Pyvlesdon nasceu em 1225, em Shropshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Roger de Puleston, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Monthermer, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Robert de Harley em 1245, em Hereford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em Little Brampton, Shropshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice de Pyvlesdon родилась в 1225 г. в местности шропшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Roger de Puleston было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Monthermer, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Robert de Harley в 1245 г. в местности хирефорд, хирефордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в местности литл брамптон, шропшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice de Pyvlesdon nació en 1225, en Shropshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Roger de Puleston, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Agnes Monthermer, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Sir Robert de Harley en 1245, en Hereford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en Little Brampton, Shropshire, Inglaterra.
